3538561372.detail_text: Easy Installation The SKAWA/SKAWA brand's Ideal glove box double hook is easy to install, requiring no tools or complicated procedures. Durable Plastic Material Crafted from sturdy plastic, this car hook ensures long-lasting use and durability, withstands daily wear and tear. Compact Size Its compact size makes it an ideal accessory for small spaces, maximizing storage without taking up too much room. Dual Hook Design The Ideal glove box double hook provides dual functionality, allowing you to hang multiple items securely in your vehicle. Enhanced Organization By keeping your car's interior tidy and organized, this hook contributes to a safer and more enjoyable driving experience.

product.desc:
Easy Installation



The SKAWA/SKAWA brand's Ideal glove box double hook is easy to install, requiring no tools or complicated procedures.






Durable Plastic Material



Crafted from sturdy plastic, this car hook ensures long-lasting use and durability, withstands daily wear and tear.






Compact Size



Its compact size makes it an ideal accessory for small spaces, maximizing storage without taking up too much room.






Dual Hook Design



The Ideal glove box double hook provides dual functionality, allowing you to hang multiple items securely in your vehicle.






Enhanced Organization



By keeping your car's interior tidy and organized, this hook contributes to a safer and more enjoyable driving experience.
